description: The htr_harness.py printed layout: 520x380 white ticket, header line then per-row crop/units/rate lines, then three hour lines. Field-region boxes are [x0, y0, x1, y1] in pixels. rows[*] boxes are templated by row index with a 24px vertical stride starting at y=38.

rows.note: cell_boxes y-coords are relative to each row's start_y + index*stride_y; add start_y+index*stride_y to y0/y1.

kn_note: kn: boxes hand-derived from htr_harness gen() text offsets; regenerate this spec from the generator if the layout changes. Real handwritten tickets need their own formats/format_1..N.json.
